summary: Test suite for OpenRouterClient with 6 test cases covering successful completions, API errors, empty responses, network failures, invalid JSON, and context cancellation
side_effects: Creates mock HTTP servers to test OpenRouterClient
notes: Tests the OpenRouterClient HTTP implementation. Uses httptest to mock API responses and verify request formatting (Authorization header, Content-Type, request body structure). Covers error cases (401 Unauthorized, empty choices, network errors, invalid JSON) and context cancellation timeout. Validates that client properly formats ChatRequest with model and messages.
